shared_properties: 120x180 frame size and three quarter front body proportions.
Academy coat base palette with gold trim and navy robe panels.
Rightward facing combat stance rooted to the duel platform.
differences: Front arm rotates into a shield angle in front of the chest.
Card hand opens and reveals a brighter cyan rune circle.
Coat hem lifts upward by about 10 px to signal incoming action.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Academy hall color rhythm, duel staging, card layout balance, and warm-versus-cool lighting anchor.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_player
reference_images.purpose: Player silhouette, costume layering, hand pose, and magical focus posture anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle for the ready state and keep the same root transform as the idle state.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/player_student_reflect_ready_4f_12fps.png through AssetServer and register the state handle under player_student_reflect_ready_4f_12fps.
runtime_notes: Ready state can replace idle instantly without position drift.
Loop duration stays at one third of a second to support a 0.5 second telegraph window.
Rune glow should remain readable even when the screen-space hand cards overlap the lower torso region.

context.usage: Shown during the 0.5 second telegraph window after a card is primed and before contact.

shape.silhouette: Player silhouette compresses slightly with the lead arm raised into a curved guard.

appendages.accessories: Focus bracer glow and crest brooch.

specs.texture: Cloth folds tighten around the elbows and the bracer emits a narrow cyan halo.
specs.shading: Soft gradient shading with brighter cyan highlights near the guard hand.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 480x180 px with four 120x180 frames.
Raised guard arm keeps a 24 px clear silhouette gap from the face in every frame.
Cyan rune halo remains inside a 36 px radius so it does not collide with the timing bar overlay.
